briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR104 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR50 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for DDR50 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Sets the tap delay for SDR25 uhs mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Switches the SD card voltage from 3v3 to 1v8.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.

briefdescription.para: Initiates the transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Type of reset

briefdescription.para: Sets bit to start execution of tuning.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Clock value to be set.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Argument to be sent along with the command. This could be address or any other information

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the DMA transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block count passed by the user.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u16 BlkCnt, u16 BlkSize, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_SetupWriteDma

briefdescription.para: This function is used to do the DMA transfer to or from SD card.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Block count passed by the user.
Block size passed by the user.
Pointer to the data buffer for a DMA transfer.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table for 32-bit DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.
Pointer to data buffer.

briefdescription.para: API to setup ADMA2 descriptor table for 64-bit DMA.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Block count.
Pointer to data buffer.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Selected frequency

briefdescription.para: API to Set or Reset the DLL.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Flag indicating whether to Assert or De-assert Reset.

simplesect.para: This API is specific to ZynqMP platform.

briefdescription.para: Function to configure the Tap Delays.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSdPs instance.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdPs *InstancePtr, u32 Cmd, u32 Arg, u32 BlkCnt)
memberdef.name: XSdPs_CmdTransfer

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent.
Argument to be sent along with the command. This could be address or any other information
Block count passed by the user.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if failure - could be because another transfer is in progress or command or data inhibit is set

briefdescription.para: Checks if the transfer is completed successfully.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the CMD/DATA bus is idle or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Value to be selected Cmd bus or Dat bus.

briefdescription.para: This function frames the Command register for a particular command.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Command to be sent.

simplesect.para: Command register value complete with response type and data, CRC and index related flags.

This generates only the command register value i.e. the upper 16 bits of the transfer mode and command register. This value is already shifted to be upper 16 bits and can be directly OR'ed with transfer mode register value.
